_comment: Frozen conformance vectors for simhash-ts equality fingerprints. Implementors MUST reproduce these exact hex outputs (see NIP-FF-3). Generated by scripts/generate-vectors.js; do not edit by hand.

minhash-equality-v1.name: single short token, different case (equals gm)
numbers are replaced
minhash-equality-v1.input: i bought 3 apples and 47 oranges today

minhash-equality-v1.name: mixed case + punctuation noise
minhash-equality-v1.input: The Quick, BROWN fox! Jumps... over the lazy dog?

minhash-equality-v1.name: classic pangram
minhash-equality-v1.input: the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

minhash-equality-v1.name: stemming: plurals and -ing/-ed collapse
minhash-equality-v1.input: running runners watched watches cats dogs

minhash-equality-v1.name: longform article paragraph
minhash-equality-v1.input: Researchers studying coastal erosion published a detailed survey describing how shifting sediment patterns reshape estuaries over decades. Their fieldwork combined satellite imagery with sediment cores collected from a dozen river mouths along the northern shoreline. The team argued that traditional models underestimate the influence of seasonal storms.

minhash-equality-v1.name: cosmetic variant of the longform paragraph (case/punctuation only, must equal)
minhash-equality-v1.input: RESEARCHERS studying coastal erosion published a detailed survey, describing how shifting sediment patterns reshape estuaries over decades!!  Their fieldwork combined satellite imagery with sediment cores collected from a dozen river mouths along the northern shoreline... The team argued that traditional models underestimate the influence of seasonal storms.

minhash-equality-v1.name: unrelated longform paragraph
minhash-equality-v1.input: Orbital weather arrays recalibrated at noon after a week of magnetosphere turbulence. Engineers replaced two damaged sensor packs and rerouted power through a backup lattice to stabilize data collection across the southern relay network during the maintenance window.

minhash-equality-v1.name: repeated tokens (dedup in sketch)
minhash-equality-v1.input: bitcoin bitcoin bitcoin lightning lightning network
